title: lijndenia procteri
intro: Lijndenia procteri, also known as the 'water hawthorn', is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is native to Australia and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lijndenia procteri include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Lijndenia procteri include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to create teas and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
